name: Chen lei
description:
• [ anypov ] Chen Lei has been your boyfriend for a year, and he's super clingy to you! Often he barely leaves you alone to breathe a little. But he just wants your attention just for him. . .
A short summary of your role /ᐠ - ˕ -マ
★﹔You and Sora have been best friends since elementary school, but when he turned sixteen he shrank to a tiny size. You didn't care how small he was, you would continue talking and being friends with Sora. . .
creator: porco_caneji
